build.beforeDevCommand: bash -lc 'if nc -z 127.0.0.1 5173; then echo Vite dev server already running; else if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend; else cd ../frontend; fi && npm run dev; fi'
build.beforeBuildCommand: bash -lc 'if [ -d frontend ]; then cd frontend; else cd ../frontend; fi && npm run build'

security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:8731 ws://127.0.0.1:8731 http://localhost:5173 ws://localhost:5173
